{{Quote|Zsinj is trapped at Selaggis.|Han Solo|<ref name="SC" />}}
The '''Battle of Selaggis''' was the continuation of the military engagement begun at the [[Battle of Vahaba]], and the last major engagement with [[Zsinj]] before the [[Battle of Dathomir (Hunt for Zsinj)|Battle of Dathomir]].

==Background==
The [[Solo Fleet|fleet]] under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|interdictor]] under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Teren Rogriss]] had attacked [[Zsinj]] at the [[Vahaba asteroid belt]], damaging his flagship, [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']]. Zsinj jumped away from the battle, expecting to return to his own territory. Instead, sabotage by [[Gara Petothel]] caused him to exit [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] in the [[Selaggis system/Legends|Selaggis system]], with his hyperdrive disabled.

Petothel put out a [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] call to Solo directing him to Zsinj's location. Solo hesitated to resume the engagement until another call came in from the [[Halmad/Legends|Halmad]] system--Zsinj was calling the [[Hawk-bat Independent Space Force|Hawk-bats]] and any other [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] he could reach to reinforce his forces. Solo knew he had a genuine chance to destroy Zsinj.

==The battle==
Solo's fleet headed for Selaggis, but by the time they arrived, one of Zsinj's battle groups had rejoined him. Zsinj also brought in the decoy ship ''[[Second Death]]'', hidden by an [[orbital nightcloak]]. After failing to destroy Solo's fighter squadrons in the asteroids of [[Selaggis VI]], Zsinj sent his imitation "[[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Wing]]" to distract [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and [[Wraith Squadron]] while he escaped.

By rigging asteroids with explosive charges, Zsinj slowed ''[[Mon Remonda]]'' long enough to enter ''Second Death''{{'s}} nightcloak. After ''Iron Fist'' entered hyperspace from within the nightcloak, ''Second Death'' detonated back into her constituent debris. Zsinj called Solo from a shuttle, and Solo believed he had finally destroyed ''Iron Fist''.

==Aftermath==
In reality, ''Iron Fist'' headed for [[Rancor Base]] at [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. Solo would still have to face him [[Battle of Dathomir (Hunt for Zsinj)|one last time]].
